name: tree-sitter-wheeler
description: Incremental parser grammar for the Wheeler language

scripts.test: tree-sitter generate && tree-sitter test && find ../wheeler-compiler/src/main/wheeler ../wheeler-examples/src/main/wheeler ../wheeler-package/src/main/wheeler -name '*.w' -print0 | xargs -0 tree-sitter parse --config-path test/config.json -p . --quiet && tree-sitter query --config-path test/config.json -p . queries/highlights.scm ../wheeler-examples/src/main/wheeler/Counter.w >/dev/null && tree-sitter query --config-path test/config.json -p . queries/folds.scm ../wheeler-examples/src/main/wheeler/Counter.w >/dev/null
